Quick Launch Strategies
Bonus
A Quick Launch is a great way to bring in
money fast if you have a product and a list…
A Quick Launch…
• They’re simple
• Easy & fun
• Lucrative - gives you a quick cash infusion
• Beneficial to your business
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 1 of 5 --

© Internet Alchemy, Inc. All rights reserved. 	2
All it requires is a special offer, a story, and a
definitive start/end
For the Offer:
• Can be a discount
• 20-50% off
• A bundle
• A special bonus
• (It doesn’t need to be fancy)
With discounts…
• Be careful… use them sparingly
• Think about furniture stores with their huge
discounts and sales
• Each time you go - there seems to be another
amazing sale
• Everything is always on sale - so the sale
doesn’t matter, the price is the sales price
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 2 of 5 --

© Internet Alchemy, Inc. All rights reserved. 	3
With discounts…
• You have to be careful with discounting your
products
• You don’t want to always have your products on sale
• It causes poor positioning
• It trains your list to wait for a sale
• With digital products, you’re in a battle with
perceived value - to maintain the price positioning
• You want to make sure you have a story and a
reason why you’re offering the discount
For the Story:
• Your story doesn’t have to be amazing or
complicated
• Example: I remember when a tax bill came in and
it had an extra (unexpected) digit…
• so I had a “tax sale” in order to pay for this bill -
from there the Quick Launch was born
For the Story:
• Example: Use it as an opportunity to show
customer/reader appreciation
• I’m grateful for you
• I’ve put together this amazing deal for you
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 3 of 5 --

© Internet Alchemy, Inc. All rights reserved. 	4
How it works:
• Generally, a Quick Launch is done completely
through email
• You could do a video - super short
• (the content tells the story of why you’re doing
this offer)
• You could post about it on your blog or social, etc.
The Timeline:
• Day 1: Send your first email that tells the “story” of
your launch
• Day 2: Send another email - usually related to the
“story” of your launch
• Day 3: Send another email and include a “24 hour
warning”
• Day 4: (morning) Send your “closing today” email
• Day 4: (afternoon/evening) Send your “last chance”
email
• Day 4: Midnight – Close Cart
Mental Triggers used in the Quick Launch
• Surprise - if you never or rarely offer a sale
• Stories
• Reason Why
• Scarcity
• There could be others like Common Enemy (mine
w/the Tax bill for example)
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 4 of 5 --

© Internet Alchemy, Inc. All rights reserved. 	5
To recap… when to use a Quick Launch
• You want to bring in money fast
• You already have an offer, a product, and list
• You want to move more people into your buyer
list because buyers are 15-20X more valuable to
your business
• You want to show appreciation to your
customers, readers, fans
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com
